user.title: Satel Link
user.description:
Found a {base_domain} integration at {host} with {zones} zones and {outputs} outputs. Satel Link will build on it.

Select submit to continue.

manual.title: Connect to the Satel Integra Panel
manual.description: No Satel base integration was found. Enter the ETHM connection details.

data.code: User code (only needed for switchable outputs)

abort.already_configured: Satel Link is already configured for this Satel Integra Panel.

init.title: Satel Link
init.description: What would you like to do?

menu_options.link: Link an HA sensor to a Satel zone
menu_options.control: Control a Satel output from HA

discover.title: Discover the Satel Integra Panel
discover.description: This briefly disconnects the base integration to scan the Satel Integra Panel (the ETHM allows one connection at a time), then reconnects it. Takes a minute or two.

link.title: Link a sensor — choose output
link.description: Choose the switchable output the link will drive. The Satel zone that follows this output becomes the linked detection.

link_target.title: Link a sensor — source and zone
link_target.description: Output {output}: choose the Home Assistant sensor to link, and the zone that follows this output.

data.entry_delay_s: Entry delay (seconds) — hold a violation this long before forwarding (entry-delay forwarding only)
data.min_on_s: Minimum on-time (seconds) — keep the output on at least this long, for brief pulses
data.invert: Invert — the output's polarity is reversed (see the note above)

control.title: Control an output
control.description: Choose a Satel output to expose in Home Assistant. Controllable outputs become switches, roller-shutter pairs become one cover, and read-only outputs become binary sensors.

settings.title: Breach lookback
settings.description: When a partition is triggered, the breach snapshot reports every zone violated in the last few seconds. Set that window here — system-wide, and optionally per partition (leave blank to use the system-wide value).

master.title: Master panel
master.description:
One tile that arms several partitions as a unit. Enter the partitions in arm order (for example interior before perimeter), comma-separated. Available partitions: {partitions}.

Home arms with the base arm-home service (your Satel arm_home_mode); away and night arm fully.

error.discovery_failed: Could not scan the Satel Integra Panel. Check that the base integration is connected and that no other client holds the integration port.
error.link_has_errors: This link cannot be created yet — see the problems above.
error.invalid_partitions: Enter one or more known partition numbers, comma-separated, in arm order.

abort.not_yet_implemented: This step is not available yet.
abort.run_discovery_first: Run “Connect & discover” first, so Satel Link knows your Satel Integra Panel.
abort.no_linkable_outputs: No linkable outputs were found. Add a MONO or BI output in DLOADX, then discover again.
abort.no_partitions: No partitions were discovered. Run “Connect & discover” first.

options.armed_only: Only while the partition is armed (motion, doors, windows)

check_arm.name: Check arm
check_arm.description: Active pre-arm check for a partition. Returns the burglary zones that are currently violated and would block arming, and fires the satel_link_arm_blocked event when there are any.

partition.name: Partition
partition.description: The Satel partition number to check.
